Frame D584 application evidence/priorEvidence as passive strict DATA.

## Import

```ts
import { frameAgenticMemoryApplicationEvidence } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function frameAgenticMemoryApplicationEvidence(
	evidence:
		| readonly AgenticMemoryRecordApplicationEvidence[]
		| AgenticMemoryRecordApplicationPriorEvidence,
	opts: StoreFrameOptions = {},
): AgenticMemoryApplicationEvidenceStoreFrame
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `evidence` | `\| readonly AgenticMemoryRecordApplicationEvidence[] 		\| AgenticMemoryRecordApplicationPriorEvidence` | Evidence facts or a priorEvidence wrapper. |
| `opts` | `StoreFrameOptions` | Optional DATA provenance for the frame. |

## Returns

A versioned application evidence store frame.
